name: moneysnake
documentation:
# moneysnake
![Authors](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2149113237/settings_images/4adb13d-824c-454-a5c-72b2c6f06e1_Arjan_Codes_-_FInal_Files.png)

Python SDK around the Moneybird accounting platform.

## Description

SDK for the Moneybird accounting platform to connect applications to Moneybird's API. With this SDK, you can easily create invoices, manage contacts, and retrieve financial data. It takes care of authentication and API requests, making it simple to automate tasks and handle accounting workflows in Moneybird from within a Python application.

## Installation

This library is uploaded to PyPi, to install simply run the following commands:

```bash
pip install moneysnake
```

# Contributing
If you want to contribute to this project, please use the following steps:

1. Fork the project.
2. Create a new branch (git checkout -b feature/awesome-feature).
3. Commit your changes (git commit -m 'Add some feature').
4. Push to the branch (git push origin feature/awesome-feature).
5. Open a pull request.

classes.name: moneysnake.external_sales_invoice.ExternalSalesInvoice

methods.name: moneysnake.external_sales_invoice.ExternalSalesInvoice.update
documentation: Update the external sales invoice. Overrides the update method in MoneybirdModel.

documentation: Save the external sales invoice. Overrides the save method in MoneybirdModel.

methods.name: moneysnake.external_sales_invoice.ExternalSalesInvoice.list_all_by_contact_id
documentation: List all external sales invoices for a contact.

documentation: Create a payment for the external sales invoice.

methods.name: moneysnake.external_sales_invoice.ExternalSalesInvoice.delete_payment
documentation: Delete a payment for the external sales invoice.
Represents an external sales invoice in Moneybird.
External sales invoices don't have custom fields, so we use MoneybirdModel
instead of CustomFieldModel.
